    • Class sc.fiji.snt.SeedManager

      class SeedManager extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • colorModeCombo
          JComboBox<SeedOverlay.ColorMode> colorModeCombo
        • countLabel
          JLabel countLabel
        • lowerSlider
          JSlider lowerSlider
        • lowerSpinner
          JSpinner lowerSpinner
        • lutRamp
          sc.fiji.snt.SeedManager.LutRamp lutRamp
        • overlay
          SeedOverlay overlay
        • overlayListener
          SeedOverlay.SeedOverlayListener overlayListener
        • seedTable
          JTable seedTable
        • snt
          SNT snt
        • sntui
          SNTUI sntui
        • swatchCacheBuilt
          int swatchCacheBuilt
          Generation observed at last cache rebuild; rebuild when generations diverge.
        • swatchCacheGeneration
          int swatchCacheGeneration
          Monotonic counter bumped whenever the swatch caches need rebuilding.
        • swatchCacheMode
          SeedOverlay.ColorMode swatchCacheMode
          Color mode observed at last cache rebuild; rebuild on mode change.
        • swatchCategoryOrdinals
          Map<String,Integer> swatchCategoryOrdinals
          Companion to SeedManager.swatchIndexMap for TYPE / SOURCE color modes.
        • swatchHostModelIndex
          int swatchHostModelIndex
          Model index of the column currently hosting SeedManager.swatchRenderer, or -1 if the renderer hasn't been installed yet. Tracked so that SeedManager.installSwatchOnEncodingColumn() can detach the renderer from the previous host before re-installing on the new one (without this, switching color modes would leave a stale chip column alongside the new one).
        • swatchIndexMap
          Map<SeedPoint,Integer> swatchIndexMap
          Cached per-render-pass color-map state, owned by the SeedManager.SwatchCellRenderer. Built lazily on the first cell paint after an overlay change (which bumps SeedManager.swatchCacheGeneration) and reused for the rest of the pass.
        • swatchRenderer
          sc.fiji.snt.SeedManager.SwatchCellRenderer swatchRenderer
          Cached singleton renderer reused as the chip is moved between columns.
        • tableDetacher
          GuiUtils.JTables.DetachableTable tableDetacher
        • tableModel
          SeedTableModel tableModel
        • tableScroll
          JScrollPane tableScroll
        • tableScrollGbc
          GridBagConstraints tableScrollGbc
        • tableSorter
          TableRowSorter<SeedTableModel> tableSorter
        • toggleVisibilityAction
          Action toggleVisibilityAction
        • updatingFromOverlay
          boolean updatingFromOverlay
          Guards against feedback loops between widget listeners and overlay fires.
        • upperSlider
          JSlider upperSlider
        • upperSpinner
          JSpinner upperSpinner
        • visitingZoom
          GuiUtils.VisitingZoom visitingZoom
          Zoom level applied when navigating to a seed by double-clicking a table row. Initialised to roughly two zoom steps above the current canvas magnification (see GuiUtils.VisitingZoom.resetFor(ij.ImagePlus)).

  • Package sc.fiji.snt.io

    • Exception Class sc.fiji.snt.io.SWCExportException

      class SWCExportException extends IOException implements Serializable

    • Exception Class sc.fiji.snt.io.TracesFileFormatException

      class TracesFileFormatException extends SAXException implements Serializable

  • Package sc.fiji.snt.seed

    • Class sc.fiji.snt.seed.SeedTableModel

      class SeedTableModel extends AbstractTableModel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • cachedStatuses
          String[] cachedStatuses
          Cached coverage state, parallel to SeedOverlay.list(). Built lazily; invalidated whenever the overlay fires (any add/remove/clear/ threshold change). Path-only changes don't trigger invalidation: user actions on the seed table will see a slightly stale Status until the overlay listener fires again.
        • includeStatus
          boolean includeStatus
        • lastKnownRowCount
          int lastKnownRowCount
          Row count observed at the previous listener fire. Used to decide whether to emit a AbstractTableModel.fireTableDataChanged() or a AbstractTableModel.fireTableRowsUpdated(int, int) (values may have changed but row identities are stable).
        • listener
          SeedOverlay.SeedOverlayListener listener
        • overlay
          SeedOverlay overlay
        • snt
          SNT snt
          Optional, for Status compute. null → no Status column.

  • Package sc.fiji.snt.viewer
